rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow teachers to define the number of questions for a quiz.
The system shall enable teachers to set the time of the quiz.
The system shall allow teachers to schedule quizzes.
The system shall enable teachers to edit quiz settings after the initial setup.
The system shall provide auto-evaluation of student performance during quizzes.
The system shall allow students to view the correct answers after completing a quiz.
The system shall enable administrators to register both teachers and students.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows teachers to define the number of questions for a quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Teachers define the number of questions, time of the quiz, schedule for the quiz and they can edit it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables teachers to set the time of the quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Teachers define the number of questions, time of the quiz, schedule for the quiz and they can edit it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows teachers to schedule quizzes.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Teachers define the number of questions, time of the quiz, schedule for the quiz and they can edit it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables teachers to edit quiz settings after initial setup.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Teachers define the number of questions, time of the quiz, schedule for the quiz and they can edit it.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system provides auto evaluation of student performance during quizzes.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: The delightful features of the system are online teachers, remote tests, auto evaluation and feedback from students.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows students to see correct answers after completing a quiz.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: At the end of a quiz, students can see the correct answers and their performance (Figures 36.1–36.10).

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system enables admin to register both teachers and students.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Admin is responsible for the registration of both teachers and students.
